## Key Website Updates

### IAIS — Climate Risk as Strategic Theme
- Nov 2025 GIMAR special: NatCat protection gaps → systemic risk to financial stability
- ICPs updated (Dec 2024): climate risk in investment and ERM guidance
- Apr 2025 supervisory application document: governance, risk management, scenario analysis
- NatCat Assessment Tool (CLIMADA): 250+ regions, multiple climate scenarios (RCP 8.5)

### IAIS — Holistic Framework for Systemic Risk
- Adopted Nov 2022, endorsed by FSB Dec 2022
- Three pillars: Global Monitoring Exercise (GME), enhanced macroprudential policy, implementation assessment

### IEA — CCUS Progress
- Current capture ~2 Mt/year vs. 185 Mt needed by 2030
- Significant gap in carbon capture deployment

### ISSB — IFRS S2 Amendments
- Effective date: January 1, 2027
- Nature disclosure consultation due October 2026 (COP17)

### IPCC — Drafting CDR/CCUS Methodology Report for 2027
- First author meeting: April 2026 in Rome

### IRFF/GAIN — 12 Countries, 1,000+ Training Participants
- 27,000 hours pro-bono actuarial consulting delivered

### IFoA + University of Exeter — Climate Risk in Financial Stress Tests
- Systematic underestimation of climate risk confirmed in stress testing frameworks
